cards.quote: it is medicine, and for a small number of Amish and Mennonite children scattered across Pennsylvania, this blue light is the thin thread that holds their entire life together.

cards.text: Why it clusters in Plain communities
A clinic built with community barn-raising spirit
Targeted genetic testing within days of birth
A household organized around a treatment
Skin thickens over years, reducing efficacy
Children grow up, work, marry, raise families
A nightly, stubborn act of love
